UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2018, APPLICATION IN SUPPORT OF PROVE UP FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT OF POSSESSION - GRANTED. PROPOSED JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION ONLY WAS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MITCH L. LYON, CSR #6840. TELEPHONE: 415-551-3703. JUDGE: ERIC R. FLEMING. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, WYATT HAHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, LAMAX THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1944 OCEAN AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Application In Support Of Prove Up For Default Judgment Of Possession
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Lamax Nguyen.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Albert M.T. Finch, III, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Wyatt Hahn Lin, who placed under oath and testified.
Andrew D. Billingsley, Esq. and Mahal Montoya, Esq. appeared with defendant Lamax Nguyen, who was placed under oath but did not testify.

Plaintiff's complaint for unlawful detainer was filed on June 7, 2018 and served on June 11, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant on August 28,2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, October 25, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Wyatt Hahn Lin, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lamax Nguyen, as follows:

Plaintiff Wyatt Hahn Lin is entitled to possession of the premises located at 1944 Ocean Avenue, San Francisco, CA.

Proposed Judgment for possession only was submitted to and signed by the Court.
